## Description {#description}

Contains a list of metrics exposed from embedded RocksDB.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `database` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Database name.
- `table` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Name of the table with StorageEmbeddedRocksDB engine.
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Metric name.
- `value` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Metric value.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
